div.head: ES–12. Editorial Note
div.p:
Representatives of the United States and El Salvador signed an Agreement Relating to the Guaranty of Private Investments at San Salvador on January 29, 1960, which entered into force, April 8, 1960. The agreement was sent to the Department of State under cover of
despatch 334 from San Salvador, February 18, 1960. (611.1643/2–1860) For the text of the agreement, see 11 UST (pt. 2) 405.
